HGSS.129.0000:
...\f
I don’t know why you have come here.\f
Anyway, I have to warn you that
this is not a place for kids like you.\f
HGSS.129.0001:
You have a certain look...\f
It reminds me of the kid who stood in
front of me three years ago...\r
You have the same eyes...\f
...\f
I’m on my way to Goldenrod City to
answer the call and join my team.\r
Are you going to get in my way?\f
HGSS.129.0002:
...
This is the Radio Tower.\r
This is the Radio Tower.\r
We are pleased to declare\r
Team Rocket’s revival.\r
...Giovanni?\r
...Can you hear us?\r
We have finally made it!\r
...\f
HGSS.129.0003:
My old associates need me...\f
We will not repeat the failure of three
years ago!\f
[FF00,0001]Team Rocket[FF00,0000] will be born again, and I
will rule the world!\f
HGSS.129.0004:
Giovanni: How is this possible...?\f
The past three years have been
a waste...?\f
How can a kid like you manage to
destroy my dream once again?\f
The precious dream of Team Rocket has
become little more than an illusion...\f
HGSS.129.0005:
...
...Hey!\r
Where has Giovanni gone?\r
I wonder if he is listening to\r
our broadcast...\r
...\f
HGSS.129.0006:
Giovanni: Mark my words.\f
Not being able to measure your own
strength shows that you are still\r
but a child.\f
HGSS.129.0007:
Ethan: Huh?\f
That’s the guy we just saw arguing with
that boy!\f
HGSS.129.0008:
Lyra: Huh?\f
That’s the guy we just saw arguing with
that boy!\f
HGSS.129.0009:
Ethan: Three years ago...?
Goldenrod City...?\f
HGSS.129.0010:
Lyra: Three years ago...?
Goldenrod City...?\f
HGSS.129.0011:
Could this be the one that the radio
was trying to reach?\r
Giovanni, their boss?\f
HGSS.129.0012:
Could this be the one that the radio
was trying to reach?\r
Giovanni, their boss?\f
HGSS.129.0013:
Do you hear it, [0103,0000,0000]?
The radio is saying something strange!\f
Team Rocket has occupied the Radio
Tower at Goldenrod City!\f
It can’t be! [0103,0000,0000], you solved
this case already!\f
HGSS.129.0014:
Do you hear it, [0103,0000,0000]?
The radio is saying something strange!\f
Team Rocket has occupied the Radio
Tower at Goldenrod City!\f
It can’t be! [0103,0000,0000], you solved
this case already!\f
HGSS.129.0015:
Ethan: They keep calling for their boss.
I feel sorry they don’t know he’s\r
not coming.\f
After this, [0103,0000,0000], you will
defeat them!\f
...Wait a second!\f
[0103,0000,0000], you’re still here.
Then, who will defeat Team Rocket...?\f
HGSS.129.0016:
Lyra: They keep calling for their boss.
I feel sorry they don’t know he’s\r
not coming.\f
After this, [0103,0000,0000], you will
defeat them!\f
...Wait a second!\f
[0103,0000,0000], you’re still here.
Then, who will defeat Team Rocket...?\f
HGSS.129.0017:
Not again...!
I’ve had enough!\r
Please let me go back to my time!\f
HGSS.129.0018:
Not again...!
I’ve had enough!\r
Please let me go back to my time!\f
HGSS.129.0019:
CELEBI is traveling through time!
It is going back to the time before\r
this strange adventure began...\f
HGSS.129.0020: There is a radio that no longer works...
HGSS.129.0021:
You cannot turn on the radio.
Giovanni must have left it here...
HGSS.129.0022:
CELEBI...!\f
We need it to get better, or we will
never be able to go back to our time!\f
HGSS.129.0023:
CELEBI...!\f

never be able to go back to our time!\f
